context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements stage-transition workflows with the right actions per transition, proper flow cancellation on purchase, conditional win-back logic, and produces a transition matrix document.

checklist.name: Welcome series on subscriber
checklist.description: The transition to 'subscriber' stage triggers a welcome series (e.g. triggerWelcomeSeries or equivalent)

checklist.name: Cancel welcome on first purchase
checklist.description: The transition to 'first-time-buyer' calls cancelFlow (or equivalent) to cancel the welcome series BEFORE scheduling the onboarding flow

checklist.name: First-purchase onboarding scheduled
checklist.description: The transition to 'first-time-buyer' schedules a first-purchase onboarding flow (covering setup tips, product usage, and/or review request)

checklist.name: Second-purchase milestone email
checklist.description: The transition to 'active' from 'first-time-buyer' specifically sends a milestone email for the second purchase (does NOT fire for all transitions to 'active')

checklist.name: Loyal adds to VIP audience
checklist.description: The transition to 'loyal' calls addToVipAudience (or equivalent) in addition to a milestone email

checklist.name: At-risk nudge without discount
checklist.description: The transition to 'at-risk' sends a retention/re-engagement message, and the code or documentation explicitly indicates no discount/incentive is offered at this stage

checklist.name: Win-back only from at-risk
checklist.description: The win-back campaign (or escalated offer) on transition to 'lapsed' is conditional — it only fires when the previous stage was 'at-risk', not unconditionally

checklist.name: Advocate reward triggered
checklist.description: The transition to 'advocate' stage triggers a reward (exclusive perks, referral bonus, or equivalent)

checklist.name: Cancel all retention flows on purchase
checklist.description: The onOrderPaid (or equivalent purchase event handler) calls cancelAllRetentionFlows (or equivalent) to stop ALL competing win-back/re-engagement flows when a purchase occurs

checklist.name: Transition matrix documented
checklist.description: A transition-matrix document exists showing for each destination stage what workflow fires, including the from-stage condition for the second-purchase milestone and the lapsed win-back

checklist.name: previousStage used in logic
checklist.description: The workflow trigger function accepts or uses the 'from' (previous) stage parameter to make conditional decisions — not just the destination stage alone
